\tzpentry{ID5854}{Gyromagnetic Pressure Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5854 introduces Gyromagnetic Pressure Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} P_{min} = \frac{B^2}{2\mu_0} \cdot \frac{V_{active}}{\tau_{decay}} + I_{gyro} \omega_{gyro} \dot{\omega}_{gyro} \end{equation}
